Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Share memory across a team of agents for coordinated behavior."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Architecture"}],"\n",["$","$L7",null,{"chart":"\ngraph TB\n  subgraph Team[\"Agent Team\"]\n      A1[Agent A]\n      A2[Agent B]\n      A3[Agent C]\n  end\n  \n  subgraph Memory[\"Shared Memory\"]\n      WM[Working Memory\n      Per-agent]\n      EM[Episodic Memory\n      Shared]\n      SM[Semantic Memory\n      Shared]\n  end\n  \n  A1 -->|writes| WM\n  A2 -->|writes| WM\n  A3 -->|writes| WM\n  WM -->|consolidate| EM\n  WM -->|extract| SM\n  EM -->|recall| A1\n  SM -->|query| A2\n"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Shared vs Private Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Type | Scope | Use For |\n|------|-------|---------|\n| Working Memory | Per-agent | Current task context |\n| Episodic Memory | Shared | Team experiences |\n| Semantic Memory | Shared | Common knowledge |\n| Scratchpad | Per-agent | Private reasoning |"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Implementation"}],"\n",["$","$L8",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\n# Shared episodic + semantic\nshared_mem = Memory(db_path=\"/shared/team-memory.db\")\n\n# Per-agent working memory\nagent_a = Memory(\n  db_path=\"/shared/team-memory.db\",\n  agent_id=\"agent-a\",\n  working_isolation=True,\n)\n\nagent_b = Memory(\n  db_path=\"/shared/team-memory.db\",\n  agent_id=\"agent-b\",\n  working_isolation=True,\n)\n\n# Agent A stores team observation\nagent_a.remember(\n  content=\"The API rate limit is 1000 req/min.\",\n  tags=[\"infrastructure\", \"team-knowledge\"],\n  importance=0.9,\n)\n\n# Agent B recalls it\nresults = agent_b.recall(\"API rate limit\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12"],["$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17","$L18","$L19","$L1a","$L1b","$L1c"],"$L1d"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@1e"]},null,false,"$@1e"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L1f",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$20",["$L21"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"QQSqVRZ0L1fJQFST1lZ0f"}
